top_signals.title: Trump Says US Would 'Keep the Strait' And Run It
top_signals.summary: The US and Iran have escalated attacks against each other as President Donald Trump says the US will "keep the Strait" and "probably run it." Both countries have been offering conflicting statements about whether the Strait of Hormuz is actually open to shipping. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Independent report: Wholesale Digital Markets Champion – first report
top_signals.summary: Report from the UK’s Wholesale Digital Markets Champion, setting out a framework for the UK financial sector to drive tokenisation of wholesale financial markets.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix loses more than 15% after successful Nasdaq debut
The 10 best state economies in America in 2026
top_signals.summary: Economy is one of the most important categories in CNBC’s annual America’s Top States for Business rankings. Several states stand out for economic strength.

top_signals.title: The 10 worst state economies in America in 2026
top_signals.summary: Economy is a key category in CNBC’s America’s Top States for Business study, and some states stand out for the wrong reasons.

top_signals.title: UK strikes landmark trade deal with Switzerland for crucial services sector
top_signals.summary: The British government estimates the free trade agreement to unlock £5.2 billion a year in exports to Switzerland over the coming years.

top_signals.title: Tom Lee's BitMine ether holdings rise to 5.77 million tokens, or 4.8% of total supply
UK inks trade deal with Switzerland – despite shouting match
top_signals.summary: The UK and Switzerland have inked a new free trade deal that ministers say will boost Britain’s services economy by some £5.2bn a year – despite talks breaking down just weeks ago to such an extent that both parties were “shouting at each other”. The agreement is the largest the UK has negotiated since it [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Extreme heat threatens Italy’s Parmigiano-Reggiano heartland
top_signals.summary: In the heat, cows spend more time lying down, eat less and produce up to 10% less milk, one of Parmigiano-Reggiano's ⁠only three ingredients alongside salt and rennet.

top_signals.title: Breach at the Beach: Play the Ultimate Entra ID CTF
top_signals.summary: Learn how attackers abuse Entra ID through a free hands-on Capture the Flag. Varonis created the Breach at the Beach CTF to teach defenders how to investigate Entra ID attack techniques using realistic scenarios. [...]
